violations.description: CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked. Observed steak stored above sliced peppers in drawer styler cooler beneith flattop grill. Observed sliced bacon stored above shrimp on ice and rice in walk in cooler.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the kitchen dish machine.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): The three compartment sink was noted not being properly operated.
